name: Shiloh 12x18 Gambrel Shed Plan - A Barn-Style Storage & Workshop Design
open_features: Traditional barn-style gambrel roof delivers increased headroom and usable wall height-ideal for tall shelving, equipment storage, or optional loft space.
Straightforward framing, efficient roof geometry, and easy-to-follow plans make this shed suitable for beginners and experienced builders alike.
Classic barn-style double doors allow effortless movement of lawn equipment, workbenches, tools, bikes, and large storage items.
Warm horizontal lap siding, clean trim details, and the iconic gambrel silhouette create a refined rustic look that never goes out of style.
description_summary: Kickstart your next backyard upgrade with the Shiloh Gambrel Shed Plan - a 12x18 barn-style shed designed to maximize interior space while delivering timeless curb appeal. Featuring a classic gambrel roof profile, clean horizontal siding, and wide barn-style double doors, Shiloh offers the perfect balance of rustic charm and modern practicality. Whether you're building a spacious storage shed, backyard workshop, garden supply hub, or creative hobby space, the Shiloh 12x18 provides smart space...
